summary: Complete dark design theme testing of DE'CLIC PRO site - all pages successfully tested with dark background, gradients, and visual questionnaire flow
passed_tests: Landing page dark design with fond sombre #0a1628 background
DE'CLIC PRO logo with orange-green gradient correctly displayed
PHASE 1 badge with orange-green gradient applied
Both path cards (Job and Explorer) with dark theme classes
Questionnaire dark design maintained throughout 12 questions
Visual questions with images loading and functional
Progress bar with green gradient (barre de progression verte)
Suivant button properly styled and functional
Complete questionnaire flow from birth date to results
Job search interface with dark theme
Results page with dark background and styling
Sidebar navigation with 9 items properly displayed
Skills archeology cards (cartes de compétences) showing
Footer with ALT&ACT link and compliance text
Both user paths (Job and Explorer) maintain theme consistency
